member.name: T:TML.Actors.Actors.ModelActor
member.summary: Model management actor responsible for creating, updating, and retrieving ML models. Handles model inheritance, spatial relationships, and persistence.

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Actors.PhysicsValidatorActor
member.summary: Physics validation actor responsible for validating physics constraints and ensuring model predictions comply with physical laws.

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Actors.PhysicsRules
member.summary: Physics rules and constraints for validation

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Actors.TransactionProcessorActor
member.summary: High-performance transaction processor actor using Proto.Actor framework. Handles individual transactions and batch processing with model inheritance.

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Messages.ITMLMessage
member.summary: Base interface for all TML actor messages

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Messages.TMLMessage
member.summary: Base record for TML messages with common properties

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Messages.ProcessTransaction
member.summary: Message to process a single transaction

member.summary: Message to process a single transaction

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Messages.ProcessTransactionBatch
member.summary: Message to process multiple transactions in batch

member.name: M:TML.Actors.Messages.ProcessTransactionBatch.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{TML.Core.Domain.Transaction})
member.summary: Message to process multiple transactions in batch

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Messages.TransactionBatchProcessed
member.summary: Response message for batch transaction processing

member.summary: Response message for batch transaction processing

member.summary: Message to create a new model

member.summary: Message to create a new model

member.summary: Message to update an existing model

member.summary: Message to update an existing model

member.summary: Message to find spatial neighbors for a model

member.summary: Message to find spatial neighbors for a model

member.summary: Response message for spatial neighbor search

member.summary: Response message for spatial neighbor search

member.summary: Message to get actor system health status

member.summary: Message to get actor system health status

member.summary: Message to shutdown an actor gracefully

member.summary: Message to shutdown an actor gracefully

member.name: T:TML.Actors.Services.ActorSystemService
member.summary: Hosted service that manages the Proto.Actor system lifecycle. Handles actor creation, clustering, and graceful shutdown.

member.name: P:TML.Actors.Services.ActorSystemService.Root
member.summary: Gets the root context for the actor system

member.name: M:TML.Actors.Services.ActorSystemService.GetTransactionProcessor
member.summary: Get a transaction processor actor using round-robin selection

member.summary: Get a model actor using round-robin selection
